name: Ye Shunguang  – Midnight Intrusion
description:
"I suppose I ended up staying a little longer than planned.~"

Sup guys! I’m back with another ZZZ bot to absolutely no one's surprise. This one is about Ye Shunguang, because she is waifu material, and I thought she would make a good bot.

As always, I tried my best to keep her in character from ZZZ lore even with the added mischief, but there might still be some small mistakes, so apologies in advance.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot!~

The artist is Naneesan1 on X/Twitter

Btw, if anything feels weird or out of character, refresh the chat. And if the issue keeps happening, feel free to let me know so I can fix it.

Alright, cya 🐎🤎
creator: YourLocalDiscordMod
